content:
2.  The Banishment Act 1959 [Act 79] is repealed.
Saving
3.
The repeal of the Banishment Act 1959 shall not affect any
warrant, order, direction or other instrument, or detention, issued or
made under the Act prior to the date of the coming into operation of
this Act.
______________________
